title: The Path to a p-value: Hypothesis Testing Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical sequence of steps to determine statistical significance using p-values in the context of hypothesis testing.
elements: Make a Decision (Reject H₀ / Fail to Reject H₀)
relationships: The process begins by stating H₀, then α is chosen. Sample data is collected, which is used to calculate the test statistic. The test statistic determines the p-value. The p-value is compared to α: if p-value ≤ α, reject H₀; if p-value > α, fail to reject H₀.
